properties.description: (Unknown) Accepts a range from 0 to 2. Affects the Mode output.
(Unknown) Accepts a range from 0.0 to 100.0. Affects the Setting output.
(Unknown) Supposedly turns the Control Chair on, when set to 1. Turns it off, when set to 0. Affects the On output.
Returns whether the Control Chair is turned on and receives power. (0 for no, 1 for yes)
Returns whether the Control Chair is flashing an error.
Returns a range from 0.0 to 1.0. Returns the ratio of the set Setting to the Maximum.
Returns the power, currently needed by the Control Chair, in watts.
properties._raw_type: Returns the power, currently needed by the Control Chair, in watts.
